race.comment: YULE POINT (8) could only manage to seventh at the latest run over 1500m at Geelong and well held at Sandown the start prior, but the fact he ran in those races suggests he's at least shown the Price/Kent team something. Recent Cranbourne jumpout second a good pointer for this. FROSTED AMBER (9) is building towards a maiden win after minor placings at her last two runs, the latest when third over 1175m at Albury, beaten 4 lengths. Drawn to enjoy a nice run just off the lead. MAGIC ROYALE (13) crosses the border for her debut after streeting her rivals by six lengths in an Albury trial and will be a force if she repeats that. HYDRATING (2) has been trialling well and warrants respect on the home track.
